subject: Clarification on Feature Delivery Expectations
body_paragraphs: I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to address a concern regarding a feature delivery that was discussed with Meridian Logistics. It has come to my attention that a verbal commitment was made by our account executive regarding the timeline for this feature, but it appears that this commitment was not documented in our CRM or any formal tracking system.

As a result, there may be a discrepancy between the expectations set with your team and our internal capabilities. I understand that you are operating under the assumption that the feature will be delivered as discussed, and I want to ensure we are aligned moving forward. To address this, I suggest we schedule a meeting to clarify the feature roadmap and confirm our delivery timelines to avoid any misunderstandings. We value your partnership and want to ensure we meet your expectations effectively.
